nl_query: Show all leaf questions in the Algorithms paper that have no rubric defined in the approved answer key.
failed_sql:
SELECT q.id, q.code, q.path, q.max_marks
FROM   question q
JOIN   question_paper qp ON qp.id = q.qp_id
WHERE  qp.title ILIKE '%Algorithms%' AND NOT EXISTS (
         SELECT 1 FROM answer_key_rubric akr
         JOIN   answer_key ak ON ak.id = akr.answer_key_id AND ak.qp_id = q.qp_id AND ak.status = 'APPROVED'
         WHERE  akr.question_id = q.id
       )
ORDER  BY q.path;
error: Validation failed (joins): Invalid JOIN: No explicit foreign key relationship exists between 'answer_key' and 'question'. Please review the schema for the correct join path.
